sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports shortness of breath following a three-hour bike ride over the weekend. The patient denies chest pain. The patient reports a cough in the past year and a half. The patient reports migraines under control with medication and avoidance of bright lights. The patient reports reflux is managed with protonix. The patient reports cataract surgery approximately four and a half months ago with good vision.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: The clinician observes perfect oxygenation. The clinician observes a regular heart rhythm. The clinician observes no jugular venous distension. The clinician observes a slight wheeze bilaterally. The clinician observes trace lower extremity edema.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The clinician's impression is a possible asthma exacerbation from exercise and allergies.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: The clinician prescribes an albuterol inhaler, two puffs every four hours as needed. The clinician orders a pulmonary referral. The clinician plans to continue imitrex as needed for migraines. The clinician wants to see the patient in two weeks if shortness of breath recurs.
